basics.name: Radhouan Terchella
basics.tagline: AI and Full-Stack Developer specializing in machine learning systems, scalable web applications, and real-time data solutions. Experienced in deploying production-ready systems with strong focus on performance, reliability, and user experience.

work.description: Built anomaly detection models (LSTM, Transformers) on industrial time-series data. Developed real-time Streamlit dashboards for monitoring system behavior. Improved detection accuracy (F1-score ~0.95) through model tuning.
Supported ERP/CRM systems and resolved technical issues. Improved internal workflows by optimizing data handling processes. Ensured system stability and smooth daily operations.
Maintained internal systems and scheduling applications. Managed inventory tracking tools and improved data consistency. Troubleshot software issues to reduce downtime.

projects.title: Industrial Anomaly Detection Systems (Kinectrics)
projects.description: Developed advanced anomaly detection systems for industrial applications, including hydraulic systems and wind turbines. Implemented deep learning and Transformer-based models (TranAD) to detect abnormal patterns in time-series data. Designed real-time monitoring dashboards and optimized detection performance using evaluation metrics and threshold tuning.

projects.title: Creative Portfolio Website (Client Project)
projects.description: Designed and developed a production-ready portfolio website for a graphic designer. Focused on modern UI/UX, responsive design, and performance optimization. Delivered a clean and visually engaging platform to showcase creative work, with seamless navigation and fast load times.

projects.title: Tom’s Barbershop Platform
projects.description: Built and deployed a full-scale barbershop management platform used in production. Implemented online booking, staff scheduling, payment processing, and business automation workflows. Integrated SimplyBook.me for real-time appointment management and developed a seamless user experience for both customers and staff.

projects.title: Barbershop Financial Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Engineered a financial analytics platform that ingests Excel data to generate detailed revenue and performance insights. Built data processing pipelines using Pandas to compute earnings, tips, and staff performance metrics. Implemented interactive filtering and visualization features, enabling real-time business analysis and decision-making.

projects.title: AskGeorge+ AI
projects.description: Engineered an AI-powered chatbot leveraging NLP and vector embeddings to answer student queries with high relevance. Implemented semantic search pipelines using embedding models and retrieval mechanisms, significantly improving response accuracy and contextual understanding.

projects.title: Restaurant Reservation System
projects.description: Built a scalable full-stack reservation platform with Firebase real-time database integration. Designed dynamic booking logic and ensured consistent synchronization across users, enabling seamless reservation experiences.
